ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mobility_data" (
  "row_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each row in the dataset */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of data aggregation (e.g., County) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "state_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the state */,
  "state_postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code for the state */,
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "pop_staying_home" INTEGER /* Population staying at home */,
  "pop_not_staying_home" INTEGER /* Population not staying at home */,
  "num_trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips */,
  "num_trips_lt1" INTEGER /* Number of trips less than 1 mile */,
  "num_trips_1to3" INTEGER /* Number of trips between 1 and 3 miles */,
  "num_trips_3to5" INTEGER /* Number of trips between 3 and 5 miles */,
  "num_trips_5to10" INTEGER /* Number of trips between 5 and 10 miles */,
  "num_trips_10to25" INTEGER /* Number of trips between 10 and 25 miles */,
  "num_trips_25to50" INTEGER /* Number of trips between 25 and 50 miles */,
  "num_trips_50to100" INTEGER /* Number of trips between 50 and 100 miles */,
  "num_trips_100to250" INTEGER /* Number of trips between 100 and 250 miles */,
  "num_trips_250to500" INTEGER /* Number of trips between 250 and 500 miles */,
  "num_trips_ge500" INTEGER /* Number of trips greater than or equal to 500 miles */,
  "avg_trip_distance" REAL /* Average trip distance */,
  "mode_of_transport" TEXT /* Primary mode of transport (e.g., car, public transport, walking) */,
  "trip_purpose" TEXT /* Primary purpose of trip (e.g., work, leisure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("row_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mobility_data_state_fips FOREIGN KEY ("state_fips") REFERENCES states ("state_fips"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mobility_data_county_fips FOREIGN KEY ("county_fips") REFERENCES counties ("county_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code for the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the state (e.g., Northeast, South) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the state to which the county belongs */,
  "urban_rural_code" INTEGER /* Code indicating whether the county is urban or rural */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_stats" (
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (people per square mile) */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual population growth rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "mobility_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mobility event */,
  "row_id" TEXT /* Reference ID from mobility_data table */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the mobility event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., work, leisure) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the trip */,
  "mode_of_transport" TEXT /* Mode of transport used */,
  "trip_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mobility_events_row_id FOREIGN KEY ("row_id") REFERENCES mobility_data ("row_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "row_id" TEXT /* Reference ID from mobility_data table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* Query parameters used to filter the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_row_id FOREIGN KEY ("row_id") REFERENCES mobility_data ("row_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization or affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_integration" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data integration instance */,
  "row_id" TEXT /* Reference ID from mobility_data table */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date of integration */,
  "integration_status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integration_row_id FOREIGN KEY ("row_id") REFERENCES mobility_data ("row_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integration_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation instance */,
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID from data_integration table */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of validation */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the validation (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_integration_id FOREIGN KEY ("integration_id") REFERENCES data_integration ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference instance */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID from users table */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report preferred by the user */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of report generation (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration instance */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the collaborative project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration member */,
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID from collaborations table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a member of the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., admin, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_members_collaboration_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaboration_id") REFERENCES collaborations ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
